{/* Hero */}

Hi, I'm{" "} Siddharth

A passionate Web Developer & Cybersecurity Enthusiast. I build modern, responsive websites and focus on secure applications.

View My Work
{/* About */}
About Me

Motivated fresher with foundational knowledge in web development and cybersecurity. Skilled in building responsive websites and understanding security best practices to protect applications from common threats. Open to opportunities to apply my skills and grow as a professional.

{/* Skills */}

Skills

{/* Technical Skills */}

Programming & Development

C / Java / Python

HTML / CSS / JavaScript / React / Node.js

SQL / MongoDB

{/* Soft Skills */}

Soft Skills

Team Collaboration Problem-Solving Adaptability Leadership Communication Open to Learning
{/* Projects */}

Projects

{/* Project 1 */}

🍴 7th Heaven (Restaurant Website)

A full-stack restaurant web application that allows users to browse menus, manage their carts, and place orders securely. Built with a responsive design for a seamless customer experience.

  • User authentication (Signup/Login with sessions)
  • Menu browsing with categorized items
  • Cart management & order placement
  • MongoDB backend for secure data storage
  • Mobile-friendly responsive UI

Tech Stack:{" "} React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS

GitHub Live Demo
{/* Project 2 */}

⚡ Auction Hub (Ongoing)

A responsive online auction platform that enables users to bid on items in real-time with secure login and dynamic countdown timers.

  • Secure registration & login system
  • Live countdown timers for auctions
  • Bid tracking with instant updates
  • Responsive UI for mobile and desktop
  • Planned integration with payment gateway

Tech Stack:{" "} React, Node.js, WebSockets, MongoDB

GitHub Live Demo
{/* Certifications */}

Certifications

  • Cisco Networking Academy – Introduction to Cybersecurity (2025)
  • GeeksforGeeks – Full Stack Developer Bootcamp
  • Deloitte – Cyber Job Simulation (2025)

Contact

Let's connect! Reach out to me on any of these platforms:
